name: Cream Cheese Fudge ~
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the unsweetened chocolate in a double boiler (using a container immersed in very hot water).
2. Blend the cream cheese and cream together.
3. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add the melted chocolate, vanilla, rum, salt, and 1 cup of chopped nuts to the mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Press the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
6. Sprinkle the remaining 1/2 cup chopped nuts on top.
7. Refrigerate for 15 minutes before cutting into squares.
